name: Prassa Me Domata (Leeks Stewed with Tomatoes)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Canned tomatoes or tomato juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the stem ends and green parts of leeks.
2. Wash thoroughly and cut into 1-inch slices.
3. Soak in hot water for 5 to 10 minutes, then drain and discard the water.
4. In a non-aluminum pan, combine with tomatoes or tomato juice, stock or broth, onion, celery, parsley, thyme or oregano, butter or oil, salt, and pepper.
5. Simmer until tender (approximately 20 minutes).
6. Add lemon juice during the last 5 minutes of cooking.
7. Serve warm or cold.
